creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text: This is due to this (https://github.com/krb5/krb5/commit/a441fbe329ebbd7775eb5d4ccc4a05eef370f08b) change in MIT KRB5. They have redefined "Entry get flags" in kdb.h. We don't have 4.16 yet but it appears that 4.16 also has the problem. We will need samba depend on krb5-119 until samba.org adds support for this change to 4.16.
